coaching.risk_management:
### 5. Risk Management Observations
- Your maximum consecutive losses (3) indicates that you may need to reassess your stop-loss strategies. Consider implementing tighter stop-loss orders to manage risk better and avoid significant drawdowns.
coaching.psychological_insights:
### 6. Psychological/Discipline Observations
- The high number of trades may reflect a lack of patience or discipline in waiting for ideal setups. Work on maintaining discipline to avoid impulsive trading decisions, especially after a series of wins or losses.
